If a tx hash, network request, or Sentry event ID is involved, include it.

## Severity (your guess)

- [ ] Critical — funds at risk / production down / data loss
- [ ] High — major feature broken
- [ ] Medium — degraded UX, workaround exists
- [ ] Low — cosmetic / minor

> If you believe this is a security vulnerability, **do not open a public issue**. Email security@nakalabs.xyz instead. See [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md).
